items.title: AMD & Pfizer earnings, ISM services data: What to Watch
items.description: Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton takes a look at the top stories for investors to watch on Tuesday, Aug. 5. In the morning, Caterpillar (CAT) and Pfizer (PFE) will announce earnings results. Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), Amgen (AMGN), Snap (SNAP), and Rivian (RIVN) will announce results in the afternoon. In the morning, Institute for Supply Management (ISM) services data for July will be released. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

items.title: Selloff? What Selloff? Monday Market Rebound
items.description: Palantir is way up after reporting Q2 results Monday afternoon, while HIMS and VRTX are way off highs.

items.title: S&P 500: Don't Panic, But Don't Get Complacent
items.description: While the economy is far from perfect, there doesn't seem to be a bubble forming in stocks. Learn why the stock market looks fairly valued today.

items.title: NCCER Partners with Simformotion™ LLC to Offer First-Ever Cat® Simulators Training Credential
items.description: Alachua, Fla., Aug. 04, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The National Center for Construction Education and Research (NCCER), the gold standard in construction craft training and credentials, has partnered with Simformotion™, the licensee for Cat® Simulators for Caterpillar Inc., to establish the first-ever industry-recognized credential for heavy equipment operator (HEO) simulator training. NCCER and Simformotion have aligned their HEO training resources to combine simulation experiences with classroom
